creator: lammas@gmail.com
text:
In the FreeBSD installer when I'm about to start partitioning the hdd the installer tells me "An installation step has been aborted" and offers to restart the installation.

Restarting the installation doesn't help and both Guided and Manual options produce the same result.

dmesg:
pid 1170 (autopart), uid 0: exited on signal 11
pid 1170 (partedit), uid 0: exited on signal 11
